headline: General Dynamics (GD) Could Be 7% Below Fair Value On Executive Transition
summary: Executive change and what it could mean for General Dynamics stock General Dynamics (GD) has drawn investor attention after announcing that senior vice president and general counsel Greg Gallopoulos will retire at the end of 2026, with deputy general counsel Nick Barnaby set to take over. See our latest analysis for General Dynamics. Alongside this planned leadership transition, General Dynamics shares have climbed 5.1% over the past month and 14.7% over the past quarter, while the 1 year...
